field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': { 'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release' }, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '投标报名管理', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['state', 'name', 'tender_bid_status_display', 'tender_bid_document_no', 'tender_bid_push_result']}, {'title': '项目与投标对象', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'tender_bid_project_name', 'tender_name', 'operation_strategy', 'tender_round', 'owner_id', 'legacy_owner_name']}, {'title': '报名与时间', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['applicant_name', 'apply_date', 'created_time', 'deadline', 'open_date', 'tender_bid_registration_time']}, {'title': '报价与保证金', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['bid_amount', 'amount_total', 'guarantee_total', 'guarantee_outstanding', 'currency_id']}, {'title': '投标过程', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['line_ids', 'doc_purchase_ids', 'survey_ids', 'review_ids', 'opening_ids', 'guarantee_ids', 'contract_id']}, {'title': '说明与附件', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['note', 'legacy_note', 'tech_attachment_ids', 'biz_attachment_ids', 'tender_bid_attachment_text_display']}, {'title': '来源追溯', 'sequence': 70, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['legacy_fact_model', 'legacy_fact_id', 'legacy_fact_type', 'legacy_attachment_ref', 'legacy_visible_document_state', 'legacy_visible_opening_time', 'legacy_visible_project_name', 'legacy_visible_registration_time', 'legacy_visible_creator_name', 'source_created_by', 'source_created_at', 'tender_bid_source_created_by']}, {'title': '平台范围', 'sequence': 80, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['business_scope_key', 'business_direction', 'carrier_type', 'carrier_model', 'carrier_res_id', 'active']} ], 'fields': [ {'name': 'state', 'sequence': 10, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'name', 'sequence': 20, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'tender_bid_status_display', 'sequence': 30, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'group_title': '项目与投标对象'}, {'name': 'operation_strategy', 'sequence': 90, 'group_title': '项目与投标对象', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'tender_round', 'sequence': 100, 'group_title': '项目与投标对象'}, {'name': 'owner_id', 'sequence': 110, 'group_title': '项目与投标对象'}, {'name': 'legacy_owner_name', 'sequence': 120, 'group_title': '项目与投标对象', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'applicant_name', 'sequence': 130,
